title: ID Analyzer DocuPass Create Request
description: Request schema for the ID Analyzer POST /docupass endpoint. Creates a hosted KYC verification session that generates a shareable URL and QR code.

profile.description: KYC Profile ID to apply to the verification session.

mode.description: Docupass verification mode determining which steps are presented to the user.

contractFormat.description: Output format for auto-generated contract documents.

contractGenerate.description: Contract template ID(s) to auto-generate when the user completes verification.

reusable.description: If true, the Docupass verification link can be used by multiple users.

contractPrefill.description: Key-value data to prefill dynamic fields in the generated contract.

customData.description: Arbitrary string stored alongside the resulting transaction.

language.description: Display language for the Docupass verification page (IETF language tag).

referenceDocument.description: Reference document front image to verify the submitted document against.

referenceDocumentBack.description: Reference document back image to verify against.

referenceFace.description: Reference face image to verify the user's selfie against.

userPhone.description: User phone number for SMS delivery of the verification link.

verifyAddress.description: Address to cross-check against the submitted identity document.

verifyDOB.description: Date of birth to cross-check against the submitted document (YYYY/MM/DD).

verifyDocumentNumber.description: Document or ID number to cross-check against the submitted document.

verifyName.description: Full name to cross-check against the submitted document.

verifyPostcode.description: Postal/ZIP code to cross-check against the submitted document.
